_comment: Technology investment categories for the 7-agent architecture (per claud.md spec).

ai_ml_infrastructure.label: AI / ML Infrastructure
ai_ml_infrastructure.description: Hardware and infrastructure enabling large-scale AI model training and inference.

cloud_edge.label: Cloud & Edge Computing
cloud_edge.description: Public cloud platforms, edge deployments, and cloud-native software services.

semiconductors.label: Semiconductors
semiconductors.description: Semiconductor fabrication equipment, foundries, and process-technology providers.

developer_tooling.label: Developer Tooling & Platforms
developer_tooling.description: Software platforms and tools that improve developer productivity and system observability.

cybersecurity.label: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.description: Security software covering endpoint, network, identity, and cloud protection.
